rulings.Case Title: PARANEE RATREESAWAD ET AL VS. RANDOLPH D. CARUSO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 28, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT SAED NIJEM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to ament to attach exhibits and to verify the complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled- Defendant is improperly raising issues of fact on demurrer. The Court notes that plaintiff's counsel failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's December 15, 2015 minute order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EAGLE VISTA EQUITIES, LLC VS. DAVID R. BRYAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 28, 2016, line 8. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction GRANTED as requested. There shall be no more short-term rental occupants at the subject premises. Defendant shall provide notice to all short-term rental individuals with existing bookings of this injunction no later than February 1, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZORIALL, LLC VS. DALE RICHARD DUNCAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 28, 2016, line 9. Defendant'S Special Motion To Strike Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on January 28, 2016 Plaintiff shall provide to the Court and to the opposing party the following: a summary chart similar to separate statement format used in summary judgments including in the first column each of the 17 allegations made in the "3 Day Notice" and in the second column specific evidence supporting "probability that the plaintiff will prevail in the claim, " e.g. specific paragraph of declaration, specific Exhibit with page and line reference. = (501/REQ)
